title: CI in_podman: don't get tripped up by CIRRUS_CHANGE_TITLE
body:
#### What type of PR is this?

/kind bug

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

In CI, we don't handle passing environment values that contain whitespace through to tests that we run inside of podman, so we need to screen out $CIRRUS_CHANGE_TITLE.

#### How to verify it

Check if the `in_podman` task passes for this PR in CI.

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

None

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

Looks like a recent feature addition to Cirrus CI.  An example of us failing can be found at https://cirrus-ci.com/task/6443955128631296?command=setup#L324.
Expect to cherry-pick this change into the release-v1.14 and release-1.15 branches if we merge this onto master.

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```
None
```

comments.body: Hmm, okay, using `$` in a PR title appears to trigger `Error starting command: fork/exec /bin/bash: argument list too long` errors in CI.
This should fix the merge errors we're seeing in https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/2548.

Nice fix @nalind 
LGTM
now let's see what bors thinks....
